name: year
description: Reference year

name: naics
description: NAICS industry code at its published aggregation level (2 to 6 digits); vintage varies by year, see naics_version

name: naics_version
description: NAICS classification vintage the code follows (1997, 2002, 2007, 2012, 2017)
observations: CBP lags the NAICS revisions: 2022 and 2023 data still follow NAICS 2017, so no 2022 vintage occurs in this dataset.

name: lfo
description: Legal form of organization of the establishments

name: establishments
description: Number of establishments

name: employment
description: Number of paid employees during the week of March 12

name: employment_flag
description: Data-suppression flag marking the employment-size range of a withheld cell (1998 to 2016 suppression era)

name: employment_noise_flag
description: Noise-infusion flag for employment from 2017 onward; G, H, J indicate increasing noise, D and S indicate withheld

name: payroll_first_quarter
description: First-quarter payroll in current U.S. dollars

name: payroll_first_quarter_noise_flag
description: Noise-infusion flag for first-quarter payroll

name: payroll_annual
description: Annual payroll in current U.S. dollars

name: payroll_annual_noise_flag
description: Noise-infusion flag for annual payroll
